name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–200 person B2B SaaS company who needs to decide whether an idea deserves roadmap time and align leadership on the rationale
problem_statement: Teams greenlight product ideas off intuition and vague differentiation, discovering weak assumptions and hidden complexity only after roadmap time is already committed
artifact_type: single-page web app with live scoring and a pinned verdict panel
